form.formComment: Finished third (26.26) at this track last time at big odds, making it six placings in a row. Drops down the inside box this time. Others read better.

form.formComment: Didn't make the placings last time at this track (26.61) in a Class 5, finishing a 8 length seventh. Has four successes and six minors from 15 starts from box 2. Others have better credentials.

form.formComment: Talented type with an excellent strike rate at this journey. Has been prominent in the run and duly saluted at his last couple, most recently over 295m at Addington in a handy 16.55 beating Durrington. Top chance.

form.formComment: Found some support last start but struggled and finished 4th over 390m at this track beaten 3.5 lengths (23.03) behind Homebush Khan in a Class 5 on March 31. Placed two back at this track. Solid formlines coming through that last run. Expected to prove hard to beat.

form.formComment: Improved two runs back to score then won again last start over 390m at this track (22.28), beating Bethany Jewel. Has claims if at his best.
